files.notes: This file contains multiple Guide Lessons for June. Lesson I is a complete theology lesson on Confirmation. Lesson II appears to be just a title/header for Work and Business. Lesson III (Literature) and Lesson IV (Social Service/Vocational Education) are combined in the final split as they flow together in the text without clear separation.
